name: The Sequencer
short_description: The Sequencer is a top-down puzzle solver game set in a computer based world with your character trying to solve puzzles by using cubes. The game contains an engaging binary puzzle system and challenges you the player to think outside of the box (pun intended).
detailed_description:
The Sequencer is a puzzle game about the main character (The Sequencer) who finds himself in a strange world where his only goal is to solve puzzles. The puzzles increase in difficulty and challenge the player to find the right solutions. The game's theme is solving puzzles by performing sequential steps with little input or instructions.  This makes the game challenging because in many cases the next step is unknown.  The player must intuitively perceive what should happen next. Anyone can play, but not everyone will be able to solve all of the puzzles.

Features:

Singleplayer

Puzzle solving

Gameplay:

Solving puzzles by moving cubes.
